name: 16q22_CTCF_SD
description: 16q22.1 SD modules flanking the CTCF and ZNF19/ZNF23 cluster. Direct-orientation SDs mediate rare ~1 Mb 16q22 microdeletions that include CTCF (haploinsufficiency causes intellectual disability with microcephaly).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~30-80 kb at ~95-97% identity, mostly derived from ZNF KRAB-domain duplicons; CTCF unique core lies between two SD modules.
